_meta.generator: Overpass API query (overpass-api.de) + Nominatim/Overpass is_in reverse-geocode for town names + web search cross-check for official websites and simple weekly opening hours
_meta.attribution: Map data © OpenStreetMap contributors, available under the Open Database License (ODbL) 1.0 — https://www.openstreetmap.org/copyright / https://opendatacommons.org/licenses/odbl/
notes: Facts (name/address/hours/website) only — no source prose copied; descriptions are one-line factual summaries written for this dataset.

categories[] uses the CURRENT PLACE_CATS taxonomy (playground|pool|park|trail|indoor_play) as a best-effort mapping so pins render sensibly today; the true finer-grained type is preserved in _osm_category (museum|science_center|zoo|attraction|climbing|indoor_play|pool|playground|cafe_playground) for when PLACE_CATS is extended — see report.
_osm_type/_osm_id/_wheelchair are provenance-only fields, not part of the events table; scripts/seed-places.mjs drops them before insert.
opening_hours is only populated for simple, confidently-parsed single weekly patterns; complex/seasonal or date-exception rules were left null with a human-written `seasonal` note instead.

town is null nowhere in this file, but was left unset upstream (dropped) for OSM hits whose municipality could not be confidently resolved (e.g. bare 'Freibad'/'Hallenbad' nodes, 'Kumplgut', 'TGW Activity Garden' [access=private], 'Kleine Farm' Steyregg) — excluded rather than guessed.
